name: Sam The Kid
description:
'''Samuel Martins Torres Santiago Mira''' (born 17 July 1979), better known by his stage name '''Sam the Kid''', is a Portuguese [[rapper]] and [[Music producer|producer]] from Chelas, in the civil parish of [[Marvila, Lisbon|Marvila]], Lisbon.

Sam the Kid has been cited as [https://www.rtp.pt/noticias/selecao-nacional/mundial2026-musica-oficial-junta-sam-the-kid-bispo-gson-papillon-e-sir-scratch_d1742271 one of the biggest names of rap in Portugal], and his legendary status led him to produce the football anthem for the [[Portugal national football team|Portugal national squad]] in [[FIFA World Cup 2026]].
